\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Boolean flag option with no argument. 

Example\+: "{}-\/-\/help"{} sets the bound bool to true. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source_l00176}{176}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source}{CLParser.\+h}}.
